message: Redis cache miss rate has crossed the 80% threshold for the checkout path. Application nodes are falling back to PostgreSQL for product, cart, and pricing lookups, increasing database pressure and user-facing p99 latency.

Cache eviction rate is spiking and hot keys are rotating out of memory faster than they can be refreshed. Downstream API latency is expected to degrade until memory pressure is relieved or the eviction policy is tuned.
Primary PostgreSQL connection pool is exhausted. New writes are queueing behind long-running transactions and several API workers are timing out while waiting for a database connection.
Replication lag has exceeded the 30 second threshold. Read replicas are serving stale data and failover safety is reduced while WAL replay remains delayed.
API gateway p99 latency has exceeded the 2000ms SLA for customer-facing traffic. The spike is concentrated around order creation and authentication fan-out calls.
5xx error rate is rising because upstream dependency calls are timing out. Gateway retries are amplifying load, and the circuit breaker is close to opening for multiple routes.
Primary MCP host CPU is saturated and tool scheduling delays are breaching the execution deadline. Active sessions may experience stalled tool calls and cascading timeout retries.
Order processing queue depth is critical and consumers are falling behind. Payment confirmation and inventory reservation messages are aging past the operational threshold.
MongoDB replica set election was triggered after heartbeat timeouts. The write path recovered, but clients observed a short write unavailability window and should be checked for retry exhaustion.
Secondary cache node is unreachable and failover is in progress. The primary is absorbing all traffic and memory headroom is shrinking during replica replacement.
Replica disk I/O wait is exceeding 70% and read query performance is degraded. Dashboard and reporting workloads are competing with replication replay for disk bandwidth.

payload.top_query_fingerprint: select orders by tenant and created_at

message: Authentication service circuit breaker is open at the gateway. Login, token refresh, and privileged API routes are being rejected until the half-open probe succeeds.
